children.heading: Publication
children.label: a Publication
children.text: In order to make continuous progress toward the long-term goal established in , the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency shall, not later than , publish and make available to the public an updated version of its document titled “A Citizen’s Guide to Radon”. The Administrator shall revise and republish the guide as necessary thereafter.section 2661 of this titleJune 1, 1989

children.heading: Action levels
children.label: 1 Action levels
children.text: The updated citizen’s guide published as provided in subsection (a) shall include a description of a series of action levels indicating the health risk associated with different levels of radon exposure.

children.label: A
children.text: The increased health risk associated with the exposure of potentially sensitive populations to different levels of radon.

children.label: B
children.text: The increased health risk associated with the exposure to radon of persons engaged in potentially risk-increasing behavior.

children.label: C
children.text: The cost and technological feasibility of reducing radon concentrations within existing and new buildings.

children.label: D
children.text: The relationship between short-term and long-term testing techniques and the relationship between (i) measurements based on both such techniques, and (ii) the actions levels set forth as provided in paragraph (1).1So in original. Probably should be “action”.1

children.label: E
children.text: Outdoor radon levels around the country.
